# Extend the refund window for holiday orders

## Context

Holiday gift orders routinely miss the standard 30 day refund window because gifts sit unopened until late December. Support escalations spike every January.

## Options

Option A kept the 30 day window and handled January returns as goodwill exceptions. Option B extended the window to 60 days for orders placed in November or December.

## Outcome

Option B adopted. The extended window applies automatically at checkout based on order date; no support override is needed.
